debug_info.goal:
U : Type
h : ctble U
A : Set U
⊢ ctble ↑A

proof:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h ⊢
  cases h with
  | intro f hf =>
    apply Exists.intro (f ∘ Subtype.val)
    intro x y h'
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply hf
    exact h'
